summary: Iteration 93: Mobile Backend API Testing Complete. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). TypeScript compilation for iPhone screens (Entry, Tabs, Tables, Settings) has ZERO errors. CEO/Manager screens have TS errors but are NOT part of iPhone navigation (correctly excluded per requirements).

typescript_compilation.iphone_screens: PASS - Zero errors in entry/, tabs/, tables/, settings/
typescript_compilation.non_iphone_screens: 18 errors in ceo/ and manager/ screens (NOT part of iPhone navigation - correctly excluded)

backend_api_tests.auth_login: PASS - garcia.rapha2@gmail.com / 12345 returns access_token, refresh_token, user with role CEO
backend_api_tests.tap_sessions_data: PASS - Returns sessions array with 4 open sessions
backend_api_tests.tap_catalog_data: PASS - Returns 28 catalog items across multiple categories
backend_api_tests.pulse_entries_data: PASS - Returns entries with total/allowed/denied counts
backend_api_tests.tables_data: PASS - Returns 8 tables with status (3 occupied, 5 available)

web_app_tests.landing_page: PASS - Loads with navigation (How it Works, Benefits, Modules, Pricing, FAQ, Log in, Start Now)
web_app_tests.login_page: PASS - Email and password inputs work correctly

critical_code_review_comments: TypeScript errors exist in /app/mobile/src/screens/ceo/CeoDashboardScreen.tsx and /app/mobile/src/screens/manager/ManagerDashboardScreen.tsx but these are NOT iPhone screens (correctly excluded from RootNavigator.tsx)
iPhone navigation only includes: Entry, Tabs, Tables, More (Settings) - all compile cleanly

success_rate.frontend: N/A - mobile app cannot be tested in browser

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing demo data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile app is React Native/Expo - cannot be tested in browser. Backend APIs all working. TypeScript errors in CEO/Manager screens are expected as they are NOT part of iPhone navigation (removed per requirements). iPhone screens (Entry, Tabs, Tables, Settings) compile cleanly with zero TS errors.
